title: Prologue to Battle! The Return of Goku!
overview: Goku is a legendary warrior and the strongest fighter on the planet, but he's about to encounter a foe from outofthisworld. What brings this new menace to Earth? And what's up with his tail?

title: The Enemy Is Goku's Brother?! The Secret of the Mighty Saiyan Warriors!
overview: When Raditz abducts Gohan and announces his plans to conquer Earth, Goku and Piccolo are forced into an uneasy alliance. The two rivals don't trust each other, but neither of them can defeat the Saiyan on their own!

title: A Life or Death Battle! Goku and Piccolo's Desperate Attack!
overview: Despite the fury of their attacks, Goku and Piccolo are unable to land a death blow in their battle against Raditz. Gohan's unexpected outburst manages to weaken the powerful Saiyan, but it may be too little, too late.

title: Run in the Afterlife, Goku! The One Million Mile Snake Way!
overview: Now that he's dead, Goku must fight to survive in the afterlife, especially during his treacherous trek down Snake Way. Back on Earth, Gohan endures his own punishment as a student in the house of Piccolo!

title: Wilderness Survival! A Moonlit Night Awakens Gohan!
overview: Piccolo tries to toughen up Gohan with some wilderness survival training, but things get hairy when the young Saiyan sees his first full moon! Meanwhile, Yajirobe summons Earth's strongest fighters to Kami's Lookout.

title: The End of Snake Way! King Kai's Bizarre Test!
overview: As the deadly Saiyan invaders approach Earth, Gohan makes slow, but steady, progress under the watchful eye of Piccolo, and Goku struggles with the "gravity" of his training under King Kai.

title: The Battle with Ten-Times Gravity! Goku's Race Against the Clock!
overview: To prove himself worthy of King Kai's training, Goku must test his mettle against a fleetfooted monkey and a powerful cricket that's big on respect. Meanwhile, in the land of the living, Gohan takes a beating from his monstrous master!

title: Shenron Appears! The Saiyans Arrive Sooner than Expected!
overview: Goku's training under King Kai is finally complete, and he's eager to return to Earth. Master Roshi uses the Dragon Balls to summon Shenron, but will Goku make it back in time to stop the Saiyans?

title: Yamcha's Struggle! The Terrible Saibamen!
overview: The Saiyans have arrived, Goku isn't even on the planet, and the overmatched ZFighters represent Earth's last line of defense. When Vegeta and Nappa unleash the gruesome Saibamen, Yamcha picks a fight that could be his last!

title: Sit Tight, Chiaotzu! Tien's Screaming Tri-Beam!
overview: Krillin's furious attack wipes out the Saibamen, but the ZFighters are powerless against the Saiyan warlords. One by one, Earth's defenders suffer devastating injuries or fall in battle. Goku's return is their only hope for survival.

title: Will Goku Make It in Time?! Three Hours Until the Battle Resumes!
overview: Piccolo hatches a desperate plan to prolong the battle until Goku's arrival. When Vegeta senses an awesome source of power approaching, he orders Nappa to dispose of remaining ZFighters starting with Gohan!

title: Farewell, Piccolo! Goku's Furious Counterattack!
overview: Goku arrives in time to save Gohan and Krillin, and the resurrected warrior is eager to put the hurt on Nappa. When it becomes clear that Goku is no ordinary fighter, Prince Vegeta steps in to finish the fight himself!

title: The Power of the Kaio-Ken! Goku vs. Vegeta!
overview: The stage is set for a final showdown between Vegeta and Goku. The Saiyan Prince is stronger, faster, and far more ruthless. Goku's only hope for victory is a technique that may very well destroy him!

title: An All-Out Kamehame-Ha! Vegeta's Terrible Transformation!
overview: Vegeta can’t handle the fury of Goku’s triple Kaio-Ken technique, so the Saiyan warlord unleashes his inner ape. Weakened by his furious onslaught, Goku’s only hope to defeat the beast is the mighty Spirit Bomb!

title: Goku on the Ropes! Pin Your Hopes on the Spirit Bomb!
overview: As Goku lies exhausted and vulnerable on the field of battle, Gohan and Krillin take aim at Vegeta’s only weakness: his tail! If they can take the ape out of the fight, they might have a chance to escape with their lives.

title: Defeat the Invincible Vegeta! Work a Miracle, Gohan!
overview: Krillin and Gohan team up to blast Vegeta with a Spirit Bomb, but the Saiyan prince refuses to die. Things look bad for the Z-Fighters until Yajirobe distracts the enemy long enough for Gohan to undergo a transformation of his own!

title: Dawn of a Fierce Battle! The Star of Hope Is Piccolo's Homeland!
overview: Vegeta has been defeated, but there’s no time to celebrate. The Z-Fighters must find a way to resurrect the friends who died stopping the Saiyan invasion. Fortunately for the fallen, Krillin has a plan!

title: The Ship Resting in Yunzabit! Time to Blast Off for Planet Namek!
overview: Preparations for the journey to Namek hit a snag when Bulma accidentally blows up the remaining Saiyan spaceship. Mr. Popo may know of another vessel, so he and Bulma travel to the Earth’s end for a closer look.

title: A Powerful New Foe! Frieza, Ruler of the Universe!
overview: A bad case of space boredom makes Bulma a pain to share close quarters with, and Vegeta recovers from his injuries only to discover that Frieza has a head start on tracking down the magic Dragon Balls!

title: The Rebellion Against Frieza! Vegeta's Burning Ambition!
overview: Gohan and Krillin beat up on Frieza’s henchmen, but their spaceship is destroyed in the process. Vegeta is headed for a showdown with Cui, and the shrewd Saiyan is keeping his true power level under wraps!

title: Protect the Dragon Balls! The Namekians' All-Out Attack!
overview: Goku blasts off in a brand new spaceship specially equipped with a device designed to help increase his strength! On Namek, Krillin and Gohan watch in horror as Frieza’s men slaughter innocent Namekians.

title: Dodoria's Terrifying Chase! A Truth Revealed to Vegeta!
overview: Gohan and Krillin risk their lives to rescue a young Namekian, and Vegeta goes on the rampage after learning the truth about the destruction of his home planet!

title: Vegeta's Covert Maneuvers! A Tragic Assault on the Namekians!
overview: After easily defeating Dodoria, Vegeta begins his violent search for the two remaining Dragon Balls. Meanwhile, Krillin and his new friend Dende set out to warn the eldest Namekian of the horror headed his way!

title: Friends Reborn! Zarbon's Hideous Transformation!
overview: King Kai telepathically "phones" Goku with a warning to stay as far away from Frieza as possible! Back on Namek, Vegeta is shocked to discover how much a simple transformation can increase Zarbon’s power.

title: Power Up, Krillin! Frieza's Mounting Apprehension!
overview: The eldest Namekian unlocks the full force of Krillin's dormant power, so the bald brawler can better protect his Dragon Ball. Elsewhere, a Saiyan-related premonition prompts Frieza to call for reinforcements.

title: The Scheme Is Shattered! Vegeta Strikes Back at Zarbon!
overview: Vegeta lays it on the line in a daring attempt to steal the Dragon Balls right out from under Frieza’s nose. Krillin’s riding high on a Namekian power surge, but he’s about to wander into a dogfight he can’t survive!

title: A Touch-and-Go Situation! Gohan, Protect the Four Star Ball!
overview: Intimidated by Vegeta's superior strength, Krillin reluctantly surrenders his precious Dragon Ball. A glimmer of hope remains after Gohan secures a ball of his own – but the young warrior is headed for a beat-down courtesy of Vegeta!

title: The Countdown to Battle Begins! Enter, the Ginyu Force!
overview: Vegeta intercepts Krillin and Gohan on their mad dash to get powered up by the Eldest Namekian, but larger problems loom on the horizon. Brace yourselves for the arrival of the Ginyu Force!

title: First Up for the Ginyu Force! Guldo's Time Freeze!
overview: Gohan and Krillin fight to survive against Guldo, a member of the Ginyu Force who possesses awesome psychic abilities! With Goku still in space and Vegeta their only ally, things look bleak for Earth’s heroes.

title: The Nightmare Recoome! Come Out and Play, Vegeta!
overview: Vegeta ramps his battle power up to impressive levels, but he’s still no match for the Ginyu goons. To escape death, he’ll need help from some heroic former enemies. Meanwhile, Frieza tries to unlock the magic of the Dragon Balls!

title: Goku Arrives at Last! Take Down the Ginyu Force!
overview: At long last, Goku finally completes his journey from Earth and arrives on planet Namek. His friends are gravely injured, but the mighty Saiyan warrior has a bag full of magic beans and a powerful secret!

title: The Star Player Appears! Ginyu vs. Goku!
overview: As Frieza prepares for his ruthless interrogation of the Eldest Namekian, Goku shows off the benefits of training in gravity one hundred times that of Earth. Will it be enough to help him defeat Captain Ginyu?

title: Full Power, Goku! Captain Ginyu’s Desperate Attack!
overview: Frieza locates the Eldest Namekian, but Nail intercepts the evil entity, risking his own life to preserve the Dragon Balls. Elsewhere, Gohan and Krillin rescue a damsel from some dinosaurs, and Goku continues his battle with Captain Ginyu.

title: Surprise! Goku Is Ginyu and Ginyu Is Goku?!
overview: Gohan and Krillin unearth the Dragon Balls, but their attempts to summon Shenron fail miserably. Later, Captain Ginyu’s devious strategy forces Earth’s warriors to do the unthinkable: attack Goku’s flesh and bones with chilling ferocity!

title: Goku’s Comeback! Call Forth Porunga!
overview: Goku and his body are reunited, but the noble Saiyan is severely injured and unable to fight. A Namekian messenger rushes to assist Gohan and Krillin in summoning Shenron, but there's no guarantee he'll arrive before Frieza.

title: Frieza Closes In! Mighty Porunga, Grant Our Wish!
overview: Gohan and Krillin - with the aid of the young Namekian Dende - rush to make their wishes before Vegeta or Frieza discover their trickery. When the dragon is unable to grant their request, a departed ally offers advice from the afterlife.

title: A Nightmare Transformation! Frieza's Power Level: One-Million?!
overview: Piccolo is resurrected and ready to rumble, but his arrival is delayed by an encounter with a dying Namekian. Meanwhile, Vegeta prepares to throw down with Frieza, but the Saiyan prince may be badly over-matched.

title: Frieza Bares His Fangs! Gohan's Overwhelming Attack!
overview: Vegeta is impressed by Gohan’s furious outburst after Frieza strikes a death blow against Krillin. The two Saiyans work together to defeat the monster, but even their combined powers won’t be enough spare their lives!

title: Piccolo Reborn! Frieza's Second Transformation!
overview: Piccolo joins the battle in progress and quickly attacks Frieza with the strength of two Namekian warriors. The powerful villain is caught off guard, but a second transformation gives him the strength to finish the fight once and for all!

title: Frieza's Final Transformation! The Ultimate Nightmare Begins!
overview: Frieza has begun his ultimate transformation, and Vegeta’s only hope to defeat the monster is suffering a mortal wound. If the Saiyan warrior can convince Dende to restore his strength, he may gain the power to defeat his enemy!

title: The Moment of Truth Approaches! Goku Back in Action!
overview: Vegeta gives his increased power and speed a test run by launching a violent attack on Frieza, but no matter how furiously he fights, the Saiyan is unable to penetrate his enemy's defenses!

title: Defeat Frieza, Goku! The Tears of the Proud Saiyan Prince!
overview: Goku arrives at the battle scene only to find Vegeta battered and badly beaten. With his dying breath, the Saiyan prince reveals the truth about Frieza’s roll in the death of Goku’s father, prompting a fierce outburst of Saiyan pride!

title: Goku vs. Frieza! The Super Showdown Begins!
overview: Goku and Frieza go head to head in a vicious slugfest that threatens to destroy the planet of Namek. Krillin and Gohan are amazed by the brutality of the battle, but Piccolo believes two warriors are just warming up!

title: A Boundary-Pushing Brawl! Goku, Frieza, and Ginyu Again?!
overview: The bruises are multiplying as Goku and Frieza continue to pummel each other mercilessly! Meanwhile, Bulma’s encounter with an unusual frog leads to an out-of-body experience!

title: Kaio-Ken Times Twenty! An All-or-Nothing Kamehame-Ha!
overview: After suffering a savage beating at the hands of Frieza, Goku summons the awesome power of the Kaio-Ken! If his desperate attack succeeds, victory will be his, but if it fails, the Saiyan race will be eliminated!

title: The Final Trump Card! Goku's Ultimate Spirit Bomb!
overview: When his most powerful attacks fail to faze Frieza, Goku turns to his ultimate weapon: the Spirit Bomb! Piccolo joins the fight to buy Goku some time, but can the noble Namekian survive long enough to taste sweet victory?

title: Awaken, Legendary Warrior! Goku the Super Saiyan!
overview: With the help of his friends, Goku succeeds in blasting Frieza with a gargantuan Spirit Bomb! Victory seems assured, but when the monster re-emerges to strike a shockingly fatal blow - Goku undergoes a powerful transformation!

title: The Angry Super Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!
overview: While Gohan races to save Piccolo, Goku inflicts a Super-Saiyan beating on Frieza. The blonde brawler’s impressive new powers drive his opponent to a desperate counterattack that could obliterate Namek!

title: Avenge the Fallen, Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!
overview: Despite the danger of Namek’s impending implosion, Goku continues his battle with Frieza, determined to extract revenge for Krillin’s murder. Elsewhere, Gohan tries to locate Bulma before it’s too late!

title: Full-Power Frieza! Shenron, Grant Our Wish!
overview: Kami and King Kai concoct a plan to restore the wish-granting power of the Namekian Dragon Balls, and Goku continues his epic battle with the villainous Frieza!

title: Goku's Furious Roar! A Last-Minute Wish!
overview: After Goku is seemingly defeated by Frieza, Gohan enters the fight to avenge the loss of his father. Meanwhile, a newly resurrected Dende rushes to make a final wish before planet Namek is destroyed.

title: Duel on a Vanishing Planet! The Final Showdown!
overview: Goku and Frieza continue their epic battle as planet Namek crumbles beneath their feet. Back on Earth, Gohan eagerly awaits word of his father’s ultimate fate!

title: Goku's Final Attack! Countdown to Planet Namek's Destruction!
overview: Goku's ill-advised display of mercy leads to a treacherous final attack by Frieza. As the epic battle between the two warriors reaches its climax, planet Namek teeters on the brink of ultimate destruction!

title: Goku Vanishes into Space! Welcome Home, Super Warriors!
overview: Frieza is defeated, Namek has been obliterated, and the whereabouts of Goku remain a mystery. How will Earth carry on without its Super Saiyan hero? And what will become of the Namekian refugees?

title: There Is Planet Earth, Father! Frieza and King Cold Strike Back!
overview: The wreckage of Frieza's body is rebuilt by the monster's fiendish father! Together, they embark on a mission to eradicate life on Earth. Will Goku return home in time to save his friends?

title: I Will Defeat Frieza! Another Super Saiyan!
overview: The bone-chilling onslaught of Frieza and King Cold is brought to a halt by a mysterious stranger with a mighty sword, but only time will tell if this new warrior is friend or foe!

title: Welcome Back, Goku! Confessions of the Mysterious Youth, Trunks!
overview: The formidable stranger finally reveals the secret of his origins after a Super Saiyan sparring session with Goku. The oddly familiar fighter is a visitor from the future sent to deliver a grave warning!

title: Goku's New Move, Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!
overview: Goku tells the amazing story of how he survived the destruction of Namek, and the heroic warriors begin their training for a looming showdown with the Androids!

title: Undetectable Monsters! The Androids Appear!
overview: Goku and his friends eagerly await the arrival of the Androids, but Yamcha's confrontation with the mechanized monsters suggests that Earth's heroes may be up against more muscle they can handle!

title: The Unbeatable Enemy Within! Goku vs. Android 19!
overview: Goku tries to pulverize the Androids with a devastating display of his Super Saiyan strength, but a mysterious ailment prevents the mighty warrior from unleashing his true power!

title: No Victory for Android 19! Enter Super Vegeta!
overview: Vegeta's sudden arrival creates an opening for the others to rescue Goku. While Yamcha rushes the fallen hero to safety, Vegeta reveals his new and improved fighting style - including the Big Bang Attack!

title: Piccolo's Assault! Android 20 and the Twisted Future!
overview: Goku wages a life and death battle with a deadly heart condition, Piccolo takes center stage in the battle to destroy Android 20, and Trunks returns from the future with a disturbing revelation.

title: The Hunt for Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!
overview: While Piccolo and company search for Dr. Gero's secret laboratory, Vegeta sets out to hunt down and destroy Android 20. Meanwhile, Trunks tries everything in his power to save his stubborn father!

title: Number 17 and Number 18! The Androids Awaken
overview: The newly activated Androids 17 and 18 provide a display of their unprecedented power and cruelty. Vegeta is eager to fight, but he soon finds himself outnumbered three to one!

title: A Sweet Face and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!
overview: One by one, Vegeta and his reluctant allies meet horrific ends at the hands of the unstoppable Androids. A bed-stricken Goku is Earth's only hope, but there's a specially-designed Android waiting to destroy him!

title: The Time for Reunification Has Come! Piccolo's Unshakeable Resolve!
overview: Faced with an unbeatable enemy, Vegeta flies away in a solitary rage, and Piccolo seeks out Kami on a quest to increase his power by whatever means necessary!

title: Another Time Machine? Bulma Uncovers a Mystery!
overview: While Kami considers merging with Piccolo, Trunks and the others discover a second time machine. Elsewhere, Vegeta vows to become strong enough to defeat the Android invaders!

title: The Monster Goes into Motion! Strike of the Super Namekian!
overview: During their investigation of the second time machine, Gohan and company stumble upon the shell of what appears to be a monstrous creature. Later, a horrific vision forces Kami to accept his fate and merge with Piccolo!

title: I am Your Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!
overview: The Super Namekian formerly known as Piccolo finds himself face-to-face with the most terrifying monster the world has ever seen. Who is this new threat? And why does he have Goku's power?

title: The Dizzying Deception and the Daring Escape! Defeat the Android Cell!
overview: Cell - believing he has defeated Piccolo - foolishly reveals the mysteries of his hideous origins. Little does the monster know, the powerful Super Namekian cannot be conquered so easily!

title: The Hunt for Cell Is On! Goku, Back in Action!
overview: Cell continues his bloodthirsty rampage, Krillin and Trunks destroy what little remains of Dr. Gero's laboratory, and Goku awakens from his extended slumber ready to fight!

title: Break the Super Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!
overview: Goku leads his Saiyan brethren to a secret room designed for highly-advanced training. Meanwhile, Piccolo puts his enhanced powers to the test against an Android adversary!

title: The Super Namekian Powers Up! Piccolo vs. Android 17!
overview: Piccolo and Android 17 trade blows in a battle of unprecedented brutality! Cell - sensing their presence - races to the scene of the skirmish in pursuit of his terrifying perfect form!

title: Run, Android 17! Piccolo's All-or-Nothing Struggle!
overview: Cell's arrival forces Piccolo and the Androids into an uneasy - and temporary - alliance. While the Super Namekian mounts a desperate, final attack, Goku and Gohan wait for Vegeta to emerge from the Room of Spirit and Time!

title: Power Unknown! Android 16 Breaks His Silence!
overview: After defeating Piccolo, Cell turns his attention to his true prey: Androids 17 and 18. The monster must absorb them both to achieve his perfect form, but Android 16 still stands in his way!

title: Tien's Desperate Attack! Save Your Friends, Goku!
overview: Desperate to help Android 18 escape, Tien places his own life at risk in an unwinnable battle with the monster Cell. When the three-eyed warrior's power quickly fades, he'll need a lift from a friend to avoid a gruesome end!

title: Beyond Super Saiyan! Vegeta Confronts the Monster Cell!
overview: Vegeta puts his new powers to the test in a shocking slugfest with Cell. Back in the Room of Spirit and Time, Goku attempts to teach Gohan the secret to a Super Saiyan transformation!

title: Cell on the Verge of Defeat! Krillin, Destroy Android 18!
overview: Goku continues to train Gohan so he can become a Super Saiyan. Kuririn has found the Artificial Humans. Vegeta effortlessly overpowers Cell with the results of his training from the Room of Spirit and Time. Cell is furious that he hasn't achieved his perfect form and gives Vegeta an offer to fully test his strength.

title: The Battle Turns for the Worst! Cell Attacks Android 18!
overview: Cell successfully persuades Vegeta to let him find and absorb Android #18, but Trunks is determined to prevent this.

title: The Tables Are Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!
overview: With Cell having gained his perfect form, not even Vegeta stands a chance against him.

title: Vegeta's Final Push! Defeat the Invincible Cell!
overview: Vegeta, still willing to fight on, tries his best in his latest powered up form to take on Cell. But with the villain literally at the peak of perfection, can anyone stand a chance against him?

title: The Strongest Super Saiyan! Trunks' Power Unleashed!
overview: With Vegeta out for the count, Trunks finally sees it fit to reveal his own new transformation to finish off Cell once and for all.

title: Cell Invades the Airwaves! Announcing, "The Cell Games!"
overview: Willing to allow his enemies time to regroup and train, Cell interrupts a television broadcast to announce to the entire world his idea for a tournament: The Cell Games.

title: Training Complete! Goku Sizes up the Competition!
overview: Goku and Gohan finally emerge from the Room of Spirit and Time. However, sensing Cell's current strength, he is still unsure as to whether he is able to defeat him in his current state.

title: The Truce Is Broken! The Defense Force Strikes Back at Cell!
overview: The Cell Game is only a few days away, with Cell keeping his promise with Goku about not killing anyone before then. However, with the army taking matters into their own hands, Cell is forced to act accordingly.

title: A New Guardian! The Return of the Dragon Balls!
overview: With Kami and Piccolo having fused together, the Earth's dragon balls no longer exist. Knowing this, Goku travels to New Namek in search of someone to create new dragon balls.

title: Hercule Takes the Stage! The Curtain Rises on the Cell Games!
overview: The Cell Games finally begins. But as Goku and the others reach the fighting area, they realize another warrior is willing to join the fray going by the name of "Hercule."

title: Showdown! Cell vs. Goku!
overview: Following the humiliating match of Hercule vs. Cell, the much anticipated battle has finally arrived: Goku vs. Cell.

title: Battle at the Highest Level! Goku Goes All Out!
overview: Goku shows the fruits of his training, giving everything he has to fight Cell who wants nothing more than a good tournament between him and every willing fighter.

title: The Opening Round Is Concluded! Goku's Moment of Decision!
overview: The match between Goku and Cell nears a close, Goku finishing it off with a surprising decision that may cost him dearly.

title: Get Angry, Gohan! Release Your Hidden Power!
overview: Goku makes the decision to forfeit his match, leaving the fate of the entire Earth to his reluctant son - Gohan, confident that he has surpassed everyone in strength, Cell included.

title: Tears for An Android! Gohan's Inner Rage Bursts Forth!
overview: With some unexpected help from Mr. Satan, Artificial Human 16 is able to give Gohan the necessary push to transcend the Super Saiyan level that others before him failed to reach.

title: Unleash the Warrior Within! Gohan Takes the Offensive!
overview: Having reached a new form of Super Saiyan, any hesitation to fight back has been removed, as Gohan holds nothing back to destroy the Cell Juniors.

title: Perfection's End! A Fury, Beyond Super Saiyan!
overview: Gohan, having absolutely no qualms over killing the Cell Juniors has moved on to Cell itself, willing to drag on the fight as long as possible if only to make Cell suffer that much more.

title: A Hero's Sacrifice! Last Chance to Save the World!
overview: Cell has been driven to his breaking point, willing to detonate himself to destroy the rest of the planet. Gohan is at odds with himself as to what to do until his father steps in one last time to help.

title: Combine Your Strength! The Final Kamehame-ha!
overview: Gohan can't help but feel helpless in front of the newly revitalized Cell. However, some words of encouragement from the heavens give Gohan the strength to fire one last kamehameha.

title: A Bittersweet Victory! Until We Meet Again!
overview: With Cell finally defeated, the fighters all part ways, closing this chapter in their lives.

title: Seven Years Later! Starting Today, Gohan Is a High School Student
overview: Now 16 years old, Gohan embarks on his first day of high school. But blending in is almost impossible for a Saiyan, and it gets even tougher when a celebrity classmate gets suspicious of a certain blond man thwarting criminals around town.

title: A New Hero, Great Saiyaman, Is Born!
overview: Gohan asks Bulma to make him a disguise so that he can continue to fight crime in the city without being recognized. Wearing his new outfit, the defender of justice makes his grand debut in the city by helping Videl thwart a gang of criminals.

title: Gohan the Teacher! Videl's Flying Technique Tutorial
overview: Gohan teaches Goten and Videl how to fly. Goku continues his training in Otherworld while Piccolo and Vegeta prepare themselves to face him in the tournament. Vegeta is stunned to learn that young Trunks and Goten can already turn Super Saiyan.

title: The Dragon Team Fully Assembled! Goku Has Come Back!
overview: Gohan and the gang knuckle down on their individual training regimens in preparation for the World Martial Arts Tournament. When the day arrives, everyone gathers on the tournament grounds, where a father and son meet for the first time.

title: Everyone Is Surprised! Goten and Trunks' Super Battle!
overview: While Gohan and Videl wait to take their preliminaries, Goku, Vegeta, and the others go to spectate the junior division, where Goten and Trunks effortlessly progress through each round until they face each other in the final round. The battle gets more intense. Goten and Trunks surprise the audience with advanced techniques. The fight between Goten and Trunks continues.

title: Restless Foreboding - A Mysterious Warrior Appears!
overview: Mr. Satan plays off his defeat at the hands of the Junior Division champion. While Goku and the gang have an all-out feast, Trunks and Goten plan to get into the Adult Division drawing. A mysterious stranger approaches Goku, keen to fight him.

title: What Happened, Piccolo? An Unexpected Outcome in the First Round
overview: The adult division rounds finally begin! Piccolo must put his skills to the test against a mysterious opponent—but not before Krillin steps into the ring.

title: Videl Battered! Gohan's Fury Reaches Its Limit!
overview: Spopovitch continues his savage assault on Videl, who refuses to admit defeat.

title: The Terrifying Secret of the Majin - The Mastermind Revealed!
overview: Goku and the others join the Supreme Kai in his search for Yamu and Spopovitch. As they travel, Shin explains what the devious duo were after and warns them of an ancient evil known as Majin Buu.

title: The Nefarious Wizard Babidi and Demon King Dabura's Trap
overview: The evil wizard Babidi gives his henchmen a rough homecoming before turning on our heroes. Was this their plan all along?

title: Don't Sell Super Saiyans Short! Vegeta and Goku's Full-Bore Power!
overview: To find Babidi, Goku and the others will have to fight their way through various opponents waiting on his ship. Vegeta steps up to handle the first stage, but Babidi uses magic to give his opponent the upper hand.

title: Whither Victory? A Battle Royal Championship Match!
overview: Back at the World Martial Arts Tournament, the crowd is getting restless. With most of the Z Fighters disqualified, Mr. Satan calls for a battle royale between the five remaining combatants.

title: Stunning Youngsters! No. 18's Uphill Battle
overview: As Dabura meditates to bolster his power, Number 18 gives it all she’s got back at the World Martial Arts Tournament. She can’t read Mighty Mask’s sporadic movements, but she refuses to go down without a fight.

title: Enter the Headliner! The Looming Demon King!
overview: Dabura emerges to face Gohan in a one-on-one battle. With Mighty Mask defeated, only Mr. Satan stands between Number 18 and the tournament’s prize money. Good luck Mr. Satan!

title: A Heart of Evil Awakened - Vegeta, Prince of Destruction
overview: As Gohan struggles against Dabura, Babidi senses dissent among the Saiyans and sees an opportunity to add another powerful soldier to his ranks.

title: I Am the Strongest! The Clash of Goku vs. Vegeta
overview: Under Babidi’s control, Vegeta goes on a destructive rampage vowing that the carnage will continue until Goku agrees to face him in combat.

title: Countdown to Revival, Crush Babidi's Ambitions!
overview: The rematch between Goku and Vegeta heats up while Gohan and the Supreme Kai head to Babidi’s ship to confront the wizard face to face.

title: The Seal Is Released? Gohan's Kamehame-Ha of Resistance
overview: The Saiyan slugfest continues with every punch delivering more energy to the dormant Majin Buu. Time is running out for Gohan to stop the creature’s rebirth.

title: Straightaway into Despair? The Terror of Majin Buu
overview: Majin Buu has been reborn. Will Goku and Vegeta be able to put aside their personal grudge to send him back to sleep for good?

title: Turn into Candy! A Hungry Majin's Bizarre Power!
overview: Gohan uses what’s left of his strength to protect the Supreme Kai, and the Z Fighters find an unlikely ally in their fight against Majin Buu.

title: I Will Deal with the Majin! Vegeta's Final Mortal Combat!
overview: The Z Fighters gather as Vegeta makes his stand against Majin Buu.

title: For His Beloved Ones... The End of the Proud Warrior!
overview: Vegeta and Majin Buu continue to fight. Goten and Trunks watch the battle unfold while Piccolo confronts Babidi.

title: A Nightmare Revisited - The Immortal Monster Majin Buu!
overview: Vegeta's sacrifice has left Majin Buu scattered in pieces but not defeated. As the creature regenerates, reinforcements arrive.

title: A Secret Plan to Defeat Buu! Its Name Is Fusion
overview: Bulma, Chichi and the others search for the last Dragon Ball so they can resurrect the people Vegeta killed. Meanwhile, Goku comes up with a plan to defeat Majin Buu.

title: Found! A Faint Ray of Hope - Awaken, Warriors!
overview: Bulma resurrects the fallen spectators, and Goku rushes to ensure she doesn’t use up the rest of her wishes too soon. Buu continues his rampage and Babidi makes an announcement to the world.

title: Find the Nuisances - Babidi's Retaliation Begins!
overview: Babidi reaches out to the people of Earth, demanding they give him Piccolo, Trunks, and Goten. If they don’t comply, Majin Buu will wipe out the population.

title: A Time of Trials! Lay Hold of Legendary Powers!
overview: Gohan finds a new weapon in the Sacred World of the Kais. Goku struggles to teach Goten and Trunks the Fusion technique.

title: Hold Majin Buu in Check! Limit - Super Saiyan 3!!
overview: Trunks is sent on a special mission while Goku distracts Babidi and Buu with an earth-shaking display of power.

title: True Worth Beginning to Show - The Treacherous Buu!
overview: Trunks tries to locate the Dragon Radar while Goku continues to stall Majin Buu.

title: Silly Looking? Drilling the Fusion Pose!
overview: Free of Babidi's influence, Buu becomes more destructive than ever as he waits for the arrival of Trunks and Goten. Elsewhere, Gohan continues his training with the Z-Sword.

title: Bye-Bye, Everyone! Goku Returns to the Next World
overview: Goku’s time is running out to teach the boys the Fusion technique. Will they manage to master it before he’s forced to return to Otherworld?

title: Gohan Located! Intensive Training in the World of the Kais!
overview: Gohan has mastered the Z-Sword, but Goten and Trunks are still struggling with Fusion. Meanwhile, Majin Buu’s destruction is briefly put on pause.

title: Birth of a Merged Superwarrior - His Name Is Gotenks!
overview: Goten and Trunks complete their first successful Fusion. Will it be enough to defeat Majin Buu?

title: Who Will Defeat Majin Buu? The Mightiest of Men Moves Out!
overview: Gotenks and Majin Buu go head to head in an intense battle, but humanity is calling upon another hero to save them.

title: The Powering Up Continues? Super Gotenks is Achieved!
overview: Gohan continues powering up with the Elder Kai while Goten and Trunks fuse into "Super Saiyan Gotenks." Mr. Satan and Buu add another member to their household.

title: What Anger Gives Rise To - Another Majin!
overview: Majin Buu retaliates against his attackers while Gohan continues powering up. Goten and Trunks take a break to regain their strength.

title: Buu Gobbles Up Buu! Onslaught of a New Majin!
overview: The evil manifestation of Buu fights the good Buu, but easily overpowers him. With nothing holding him back, he seeks out the opponent Goku had promised him.

title: Headlong Rush into Catastrophe! A One-Hour Time Limit!
overview: Piccolo convinces Super Buu to wait for one hour before battling Trunks and Goten while they train in the Hyperbolic Time Chamber.

title: Training Complete! You're Finished Now, Majin Buu!
overview: Piccolo stalled Super Buu for as long as he could. But it’s time for the rematch between Super Buu and Gotenks.

title: Eliminating Buu with Ghosts: A Knockout Kamikaze Attack!
overview: Super Buu and Gotenks square off inside the Hyperbolic Time Chamber and Gotenks reveals a new ability.

title: Gotenks' Ace in the Hole! Transformation! Super Gotenks 3!
overview: Piccolo has destroyed the Hyperbolic Time Chamber, trapping himself and Gotenks with Super Buu. After Buu escapes, the others become desperate to free themselves as well.

title: On a Roll! Buu-Buu-Volleyball!
overview: A newly powered up Gotenks seeks vengeance on Super Buu, but Buu has made it clear he won’t go down without a fight.

title: Thanks for Waiting, Everyone! A Reborn Gohan Heads for Earth!
overview: The battle between Gotenks and Super Buu ends abruptly when Buu inexplicably falls asleep. Gohan is finally ready to unleash his new powers.

title: Buu Overwhelmed! Ultimate Gohan's Super Power!
overview: Gohan tests his newfound power against Super Buu in brutal combat.

title: Buu's Sinister Scheme: Gotenks Is Absorbed
overview: Majin Buu returns to the battlefield with suspiciously renewed confidence. Turning his focus to Trunks and Goten, he goads them into becoming Gotenks once more

title: The Elder Kai's Brainstorm! Return to Life, Goku!
overview: Gohan’s fight with Buu continues, but Gohan is struggling to keep up. Left with no other options, the Elder Kai decides that Goku must return to Earth.

title: Miracles Happen Once... Will Goku and He Make the Ultimate Combination?
overview: Goku and Gohan plan to fuse to finish off the weakened Super Buu. But when things go awry, Goku finds himself resorting to desperate measures.

title: Invincible! The Ultimate Warrior Vegetto
overview: The newly formed Vegetto adjusts to his new body while taunting Super Buu. What should have been a quick fight turns ugly when Vegetto angers the creature putting the universe at risk.

title: Buu's Ace in the Hole! The Warriors Are Absorbed!
overview: Vegetto continues fighting Super Buu, neither warrior showing any sign of slowing down or admitting defeat.

title: Rescue Gohan and the Others! Goku and Vegeta's Infiltration Mission!
overview: Vegeta and Goku un-fuse inside of Majin Buu. They are able to protect themselves from being completely absorbed and search for a way to destroy the monster from within.

title: Emergency Escape from the Body! Buu's Retrogression into Evil!
overview: The battle continues inside Buu’s body with Vegeta and Goku outmatched. When Vegeta exploits the weakness Buu has been protecting, Buu begins another transformation.

title: Earth Destroyed! The Initial Buu's Nefarious Strike
overview: Kibito Kai reveals Majin Buu’s history and the root of his many personalities. Back on the battlefield, Goku and Vegeta attempt to stop Kid Buu from destroying Earth.

title: A Final Showdown at the Summit! Face-Off in the World of the Kais!
overview: Goku and Vegeta reveal their location and lure Kid Buu to the World of the Kais, away from Krillin and Yamcha.

title: Hang In There, Kakarot! You Are No. 1!
overview: Goku powers up to Super Saiyan 3 to fight Kid Buu. Vegeta watches in awe, reflecting on the years he spent chasing the other Saiyan.

title: A One-Minute Match-Up! Vegeta's Life-Threatening Stall for Time!
overview: Goku goes toe-to-toe with Kid Buu but can’t finish him off. He has a plan, but he’ll need Vegeta’s help to see it through. Can the Saiyan prince distract Kid Buu long enough for Goku to charge up?

title: An Inspired Strategy - Make Two Wishes Come True!
overview: Mr. Satan stands up to Kid Buu, causing a rift to form between two of the creature’s personalities. Vegeta sends Dende on a special mission.

title: Share Your Spirit Energy with Me! I'm Making a Huge Spirit Bomb!
overview: Vegeta’s plan comes together when Dende revives Earth and its population. If they can get all of humanity to offer their energy to Goku, he just might be able to form a Spirit Bomb powerful enough to end this fight once and for all.

title: You Are the Savior of the World! Everybody's Spirit Bomb Completed!
overview: The people of Earth are still unsure of Vegeta’s intentions. Without their help, the Spirit Bomb will never be strong enough. When all hope seems lost, an unlikely hero turns the tides.

title: You Really Are the Greatest, Goku!! The Demise of Majin Buu
overview: With the Spirit Bomb fully formed, Goku only needs to find the power to wield the mighty weapon and save the universe.

title: And So, Ten Years Later... A Long-Awaited World Martial Arts Tournament!
overview: It’s now been ten years since the defeat of Kid Buu, and the Z Fighters are reuniting for the World Martial Arts Tournament. New faces and familiar fighters prepare to enter the competition—one in particular has caught Goku’s attention.

title: Even Stronger! Goku's Dream Is Never-Ending!
overview: The tournament begins, and Goku faces a young boy named Uub who possesses incredible power and a shocking origin.
